message:
fix(abi): add errno to recvmsg/accept4 Deny paths, fseek overflow check, getchar delegation

Socket:
- Add set_abi_errno(EACCES) to recvmsg and accept4 Deny paths (missed
  in prior errno propagation pass)

Stdio:
- fseek(): Replace saturating_add with checked_add for SEEK_CUR offset
  computation; return EOVERFLOW on overflow instead of silently clamping
- getchar(): Delegate to fgetc(STDIN_SENTINEL) for buffering coherence
  (mirrors putchar → fputc pattern)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
